scripts.render:diagrams: for f in book/architecture/data-pipeline.md book/architecture/security-model.md book/architecture/system-topology.md; do name=$(basename "$f" .md | tr '-' '_'); sed -n '/^```mermaid$/,/^```$/{ /^```mermaid$/d; /^```$/d; p; }' "$f" > /tmp/"$name".mmd && npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli -i /tmp/"$name".mmd -o book/assets/architecture/"$name".svg -w 2400 --backgroundColor transparent; done
